name: Sauteed Broccoli Rabe with Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Broccoli rabe, rinsed, tough stems discarded, stalks cut into 3-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the olive oil to the melted butter.
3. Add the broccoli rabe pieces, coating them with the butter mixture.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Cover and cook for 1 minute.
6. Stir the broccoli rabe and reduce the heat to moderate.
7. Continue cooking until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes.
8. Season again with salt and pepper.
9. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and serve.
